title: DataFrame
summary:
C++ DataFrame for statistical, Financial, and ML analysis -- in modern C++ using native types and contiguous memory storage 
 This is a C analytical library designed for data analysis similar to libraries in Python and R. For example, you would compare this to Pandashttpspandas.pydata.org or R data.framehttpswww.w3schools.comrrdataframes.asp. The depth and breadth of functionalities offered by C DataFrame alone are many times greater than functionalities offered by packages such as Pandas, data.
